generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text reinforced existing concerns about security, emphasizing the need for stronger domestic security powers. The appeal to recent events and the framing of hesitation as leading to tragedy resonated with the profile's high neuroticism and anxiety, particularly around stress vulnerability. The argument about civil liberties not being violated also reduced some of the baseline hesitation.

request_payload.exposure_text: After the 2024 crisis, we can't afford to be naive. Local law enforcement needs stronger tools to preempt threats before they materialize. Yes, civil liberties matter, but when was the last time expanded domestic security powers actually violated your rights? Meanwhile, we've seen how hesitation leads to tragedy. Our allies are stepping up - when will we? #NationalSecurityFirst #LessonsFrom2024
